mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESERVATIONS (user_id, seat_id, round_id, reserved_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{seatId}, #{roundId}, 'reserved')
mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.user_id AS userId, r.seat_id AS seatId, r.round_id AS roundId, r.reserved_status AS reservedStatus, r.created_reserved AS createdReserved, s.seat_row AS seatRow, s.seat_colume AS seatColume, s.grade, p.p_title AS pTitle, pr.round_time AS roundTime FROM RESERVATIONS r JOIN SEATS s ON r.seat_id = s.seat_id JOIN PERFORMANCE_ROUND pr ON r.round_id = pr.round_id JOIN PERFORMANCES p ON pr.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.reserved_status = 'reserved' ORDER BY r.created_reserved DESC

SELECT reservation_id AS reservationId, user_id AS userId, seat_id AS seatId, round_id AS roundId, reserved_status AS reservedStatus, created_reserved AS createdReserved FROM RESERVATIONS WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
